message:
chore: update beads issue tracking and add ciborium dependency to Cargo.lock

The beads issues.jsonl reflects latest issue metadata changes including
updated dependency graphs and comment additions for mesh revocation SLA
beads (08dl2 and related). Cargo.lock picks up the ciborium CBOR
serialization crate now used by multiple fcp-* connector crates
(fcp-telegram, fcp-discord, fcp-matrix, fcp-mesh, fcp-irc, fcp-slack,
fcp-signal, fcp-xmpp, fcp-whatsapp, fcp-bridge, fcp-webhook) as part
of the ongoing CBOR wire-format migration for the Flywheel Connector
Protocol.

- .beads/issues.jsonl: updated dependency metadata and comments on
  open mesh/revocation beads
- Cargo.lock: added ciborium to 12 fcp-* crate dependency trees

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
